overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Far Cry 6, beginning in a covered tropical cantina patio with 'Bienvenido a Yara' graffiti, transitioning through palm-lined streets and dirt paths to a sandy beach, encountering NPCs on horseback, and ending at a concrete waterfront platform overlooking mangroves.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining patio of tropical cantina

events.description: exiting the covered patio area into the open street

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered patio of a red cantina building, passing empty tables and chairs toward the street exit

entered.detail: red painted building with corrugated metal roof and wooden support posts
corrugated metal roof covering the outdoor dining area
round tables with blue chairs arranged on the patio
large circular green and red mural with text reading 'BIENVENIDO A YARA'
tall palm trees visible beyond the patio exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered outdoor patio of a tropical cantina with red walls and a corrugated metal roof. The camera moves past empty dining tables and a prominent 'Bienvenido a Yara' mural, exiting the sheltered area into bright sunlight around the 12-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical residential street with palm trees

events.description: moving from shaded patio into bright direct sunlight
transitioning from paved street to dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved street lined with palm trees, passing a pink residential building on the left

entered.detail: two-story pink building with white balcony railings and red roof
low stone wall lining the edge of the street
green dumpster and black trash bins against the wall

segments.scene_description: Having exited the cantina, the camera moves along a sunlit tropical street lined with tall palm trees. A pink residential building stands on the left while the camera approaches a transition from asphalt to dirt path near a stone retaining wall with trash bins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path leading to beach with coastal vegetation

events.description: NPCs on horseback enter the scene from the left, riding along the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path toward the beach, approaching and passing NPCs on horseback

notable_agents.action: riding a brown horse along the dirt path toward the camera
walking across the sandy area near the beach

entered.detail: wooden gazebo with red tiled roof on the beach
turquoise blue ocean visible between the trees
dense green shrubs and flowering plants lining the path

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a dirt path through tropical vegetation toward a beach, with a wooden gazebo and turquoise ocean coming into view. Around 40 seconds, NPCs on horseback appear riding along the path, and the camera continues toward the sandy beach area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with mangrove waterfront and concrete platform

events.description: moving from sandy beach onto elevated concrete platform

agents.ego_description: walking across the sandy beach toward a concrete waterfront platform, observing the coastal environment

notable_agents.action: standing near the water's edge looking out at the ocean

entered.detail: elevated concrete observation platform with cracked surface and metal railings
coastal mangrove trees with exposed roots growing in the shallow water
large gray boulder on the sand near the platform entrance
small wooden pier structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves across the open sandy beach with mangrove trees lining the water's edge. The camera approaches and ascends onto an elevated concrete platform overlooking the ocean, passing a large rock boulder and ending with a view of the water and distant wooden dock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a tropical cantina out toward an expansive coastal waterfront. It begins under a corrugated metal roof among empty dining tables and a Bienvenido a Yara mural, moving forward until the shade gives way to bright sunlight. As the camera exits the patio, the scene shifts to a sunlit street lined with tall palm trees and pink residential buildings before transitioning from asphalt onto a dirt path. The path then leads through lush tropical vegetation and past NPCs on horseback, gradually opening up to reveal a wooden gazebo and the turquoise ocean. Finally, the camera moves across a sandy beach and past a large boulder, ascending onto an elevated concrete platform that overlooks the mangroves and a distant wooden dock.
